name: Korean: Kim Chee - 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the ends of the cucumber, but do not peel it.
2. Cut each cucumber in half lengthwise and remove the seeds.
3. Cut into 1-1/2-inch pieces.
4. Mix 1 tablespoon of salt thoroughly with the cucumber pieces and allow to stand for 15 minutes.
5. Wash off all the salt.
6. Cut the scallion into thin strips, then into 2-inch pieces.
7. Smash, peel, and mince garlic.
8. Mince chili pepper.
9. Combine cucumber, scallion, garlic, chili pepper, and the remaining 1/2 tablespoon of salt with water in a crock or pot.
10. Mix thoroughly.
11. Cover tightly and allow to stand at room temperature for 2 days.
12. The Kim Chee will keep for 2 weeks if refrigerated in a tightly covered jar.
